attempted_route: biopsykit.sleep.sleep_processing_pipeline.predict_pipeline_acceleration(acc_data) with acc columns renamed from acc_x/y/z to x/y/z via str.replace; pickle.load for data; pd.to_datetime for index
observation: TypeError at line 34: predict_pipeline_acceleration() missing 1 required positional argument: 'sampling_rate'; exit_code=1 after 1.8s
rationale: The agent called predict_pipeline_acceleration without the mandatory 'sampling_rate' positional argument. BioPsyKit's API requires the sensor sampling rate (Hz) to compute the activity index correctly; the agent omitted it entirely despite the function signature requiring it.
recommended_alternative: Call biopsykit.sleep.sleep_processing_pipeline.predict_pipeline_acceleration(acc_data, sampling_rate=50) — infer the Hz from the DatetimeIndex (e.g., pd.infer_freq or 1/acc_data.index.to_series().diff().dt.total_seconds().median()). Pass the resulting float as sampling_rate.
